July 22nd, 1:02 PM.
It's been 1 hour and 37 minutes since arriving at Hitogashima Island…
I ate this thing called "<color=#GF_TIPS_061>nare sushi</color>" before getting on the ferry. It was exquisite.

If you come to Wakayama, you should try it…
I want to hear your thoughts.
By the way, you asked me earlier why I hang upside down, didn't you?
I'll answer you now: doing this lets blood pool in my brain, which makes my thoughts clearer.
You should try it yourself sometime. It might make that dull head of yours a little sharper.
I'll observe the situation for a while. That is all.
